query:
SELECT id, cobertizoId, producto, cliente, 
  (SELECT cliente FROM anuncios WHERE paradaId = paradas.id AND estado IN ('Activo', 'Programado') AND approvalStatus = 'approved' ORDER BY fechaInicio DESC LIMIT 1) as anuncioCliente
FROM paradas 
WHERE LOWER(producto) = 'kfc' OR LOWER(cliente) = 'kfc'
LIMIT 10;
